name: Data Bender
description: Circuit-bent stereo audio buffer. 96kHz/24-bit buffer of ~1 minute feeds clocked Bend, Break, Corrupt and Freeze manipulations modeled on failing tape, skipping CDs and crashing software.

controls.name: Time
controls.description: Sets sample period of the processed buffer slice. Internal: frequency. External: clock divide/multiply.
controls.detail: Internal: 80Hz – 16s · External: /16, /8, /4, /2, x1, x2, x3, x4, x8 · CV ±5V

controls.name: Repeats
controls.description: Subdivides the active buffer into smaller stutter slices. CCW = one slice, CW = many short slices.

controls.name: Mix
controls.description: Dry/wet balance between live input and processed buffer.
controls.detail: CV ±5V · Freeze forces mix fully wet

controls.name: Bend
controls.description: Macro: probabilistic varispeed, reverse, tape-stop, vinyl pops on each clock division. Micro: direct playback speed ±3 octaves.
controls.detail: Macro CCW: off · Micro CCW: reverse · LED cyan/gold at octave multiples

controls.name: Break
controls.description: Macro: probabilistic buffer-section jumps, added repeats, up to 90% silence. Micro: Traverse buffer sections or duty-cycle silence.
controls.detail: Micro mode toggled by button press · LED blips gold on slice change

controls.name: Corrupt
controls.description: Button steps Decimate → Dropout → Destroy. Knob sets intensity of the active mode.
controls.detail: Decimate: bitcrush + downsample · Dropout: random muted frames · Destroy: soft sat → hard clip · CV ±5V

controls.name: Mode
controls.description: Toggles Bend and Break between Macro (automated, clock-synced) and Micro (direct manual control).
controls.detail: Blue LED: Macro · Green LED: Micro

controls.name: Clock
controls.description: Selects internal or external clock source for Time. Blue: internal. White: external.
controls.detail: Dim white = external clock lost · runs at last rate until new pulse

controls.name: Shift
controls.description: Hold to access edit layer for windowing, stereo mode, gate behavior, corrupt-as-reset, freeze mode, restore defaults.
controls.detail: SHIFT + Break = restore defaults · SHIFT + Time = glitch windowing

controls.name: Freeze
controls.description: Stops writing new audio to the buffer; manipulations keep running on frozen material.
controls.detail: Latching (blue) quantizes to next clock · Momentary (green) engages instantly

inputs.name: clock
inputs.description: External clock input for Time / external clock mode

inputs.name: left
inputs.description: Stereo left audio input · normalized to right when unpatched

inputs.name: corrupt cv
inputs.description: CV control over Corrupt intensity · reassignable to Reset with SHIFT + Corrupt

inputs.name: bend gate
inputs.description: Gate enables/disables Bend effect · latching or momentary per edit menu

inputs.name: break gate
inputs.description: Gate enables/disables Break effect · repurposable via SHIFT + Corrupt

inputs.name: time
inputs.description: CV over Time control · sums with knob in both clock modes

inputs.name: freeze
inputs.description: Gate engages Freeze · latching or momentary per edit menu

outputs.name: left
outputs.voltage: modular level · up to 14Vpp with heavy corruption

outputs.name: right
outputs.voltage: modular level · up to 14Vpp with heavy corruption

behaviors.name: Macro vs Micro mode
behaviors.description: Macro fires Bend/Break probabilistically on each clock division — knobs scale the amount of automated chaos. Micro turns Bend into direct playback speed (±3 oct, reverse below noon) and Break into manual buffer-slice selection (Traverse) or silence duty-cycle. Use Macro for hands-off generative glitch, Micro for performative control.

behaviors.name: Background buffer
behaviors.description: Writes continue outside the current Time window. Sweeping Time down after Freeze drags up to a minute of older recorded audio back into playback — expect discontinuities and fragments of earlier material.

behaviors.name: Freeze forces wet mix
behaviors.description: Engaging Freeze while Mix is fully dry instantly pushes Mix to fully wet. Lets the patch run clean until Freeze fires, then slams into the queued glitch state — performative stutter gate.

behaviors.name: Corrupt as Reset
behaviors.description: Green LED on Corrupt turns the Corrupt Gate input into a buffer/clock reset. In internal clock mode it restarts the clock and reloads the buffer (can click). In external mode it aligns the subdivision counter to an external beat — useful for DAW sync.

behaviors.name: Glitch windowing
behaviors.description: Sets envelope on stutter edges. CCW: hard edges and clicks — glitch beats, SFX. CW: fully windowed fades — ambient textures. Default is 2% minimal window; restored by SHIFT + Break.

behaviors.name: Stereo unique vs shared
behaviors.description: Blue: Macro Bend/Break make independent random decisions per channel — wide decorrelated glitch. Green: both channels share identical automation — image stays centered. Only affects Macro mode.

behaviors.name: Gate latch vs momentary
behaviors.description: Blue: each trigger into bend/break/corrupt Gate toggles the effect. Green: effect is held on only while the gate is high. Applies to all three effect gates simultaneously.

behaviors.name: Destroy output level
behaviors.trigger: Corrupt in Destroy with high knob
behaviors.description: Second half of the Corrupt knob in Destroy mode moves from soft saturation into hard clip with large gain boost. Output can hit 14Vpp — attenuate before downstream modules, especially with line-level input.

behaviors.name: Settings persist
behaviors.description: Bend/Break state, Corrupt mode, clock source, Macro/Micro, stereo mode, windowing, gate behaviors and corrupt-as-reset are stored to memory every time SHIFT is released (at most every 2 seconds). Restore defaults with SHIFT + Break.

patchIdeas.name: Clocked beat mangler
patchIdeas.patch: Macro Mode · external clock driving clock in · Time knob near x1 · Bend and Break both enabled at ~2 o'clock · Stereo Unique · feed drum bus in, get a re-timed, occasionally reversed, pop-strewn variant that stays on grid
patchIdeas.diagram:
Data Bender:
* Mode: Macro
* Time: x1 (match input clock)
* Bend: ~2 o'clock (enabled)
* Break: ~2 o'clock (enabled)
* Stereo: Unique

Clock:

Drums:

- Clock (Out) c> Data Bender (clock)
- Drums (L) -> Data Bender (In left)
- Drums (R) -> Data Bender (In right)
- Data Bender (Out left) -> Output (L)
- Data Bender (Out right) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Tape-stop freeze stab
patchIdeas.patch: Micro Mode · Bend knob CCW (reverse) · Freeze set to momentary (SHIFT + Freeze green) · Mix fully dry · gate into Freeze input on snare hits · each snare fires a frozen reversed stutter over the dry signal
patchIdeas.diagram:
Data Bender:
* Mode: Micro
* Bend: CCW (reverse)
* Mix: fully dry
* Freeze: momentary (green)

Gate Source:

- Source (L) -> Data Bender (In left)
- Gate Source (Out) g> Data Bender (freeze)
- Data Bender (Out left) -> Output (L)
- Data Bender (Out right) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Krell destruction feedback
patchIdeas.patch: Random CV into time CV and repeats CV · Corrupt in Destroy at ~1 o'clock · LFO into corrupt cv · self-modulating glitch texture from a single sustained pad
patchIdeas.diagram:
Data Bender:
* Corrupt: Destroy · ~1 o'clock
* Time: slow
* Mix: fully wet

Pad:

Random:

LFO:

- Pad (Out) -> Data Bender (In left)
- Random (Out) >> Data Bender (time)
- Random (Out) >> Data Bender (repeats)
- LFO (Out) >> Data Bender (corrupt cv)
- Data Bender (Out left) -> Output (L)
- Data Bender (Out right) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: DAW-locked buffer reset
patchIdeas.patch: External clock mode · SHIFT + Corrupt to enable Corrupt-as-Reset · send DAW bar clock to corrupt gate · Time at /4 · buffer rebuilds cleanly on every downbeat · drop glitch in without phase drift
patchIdeas.diagram:
Data Bender:
* Clock: External
* Time: /4
* Corrupt gate: Reset (SHIFT+Corrupt)

DAW Clock:

Bar Trig:

Source:

- DAW Clock (Out) c> Data Bender (clock)
- Bar Trig (Out) t> Data Bender (corrupt gate) // buffer/clock reset
- Source (Out) -> Data Bender (In left)
- Data Bender (Out left) -> Output (L)

patchIdeas.name: Micro scrub instrument
patchIdeas.patch: Micro Mode · Freeze latched on · manual keyboard CV into bend cv for playable ±3 oct scrubbing · Break knob selects the buffer slice to scrub · Repeats medium for short loops · turn the buffer into a playable sampler
patchIdeas.diagram:
Data Bender:
* Mode: Micro
* Freeze: latched ON
* Repeats: ~noon
* Break: Traverse

Keyboard:

Source:

- Source (Out) -> Data Bender (In left)
- Keyboard (CV) p> Data Bender (bend cv) // scrub pitch
- Data Bender (Out left) -> Output (L)
- Data Bender (Out right) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Skipping CD pad
patchIdeas.patch: Macro Mode · Bend OFF · Break ~3 o'clock · Corrupt in Dropout at ~11 o'clock · SHIFT+Time CW for fully windowed edges · gentle random slice skips and momentary dropouts over an ambient pad without clicks
patchIdeas.diagram:
Data Bender:
* Mode: Macro
* Bend: OFF
* Break: ~3 o'clock
* Corrupt: Dropout · ~11 o'clock
* Windowing: max (SHIFT+Time CW)

Clock:

Pad:

- Pad (Out) -> Data Bender (In left)
- Clock (Out) c> Data Bender (clock)
- Data Bender (Out left) -> Output (L)
- Data Bender (Out right) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Wide stereo decorrelator
patchIdeas.patch: Mono source into left input · right input unpatched (normalized from left) · Stereo Unique mode (SHIFT+Bend blue) · Macro Bend and Break low · clock at x4 · tiny independent per-channel glitches widen a mono signal into a decorrelated stereo field
patchIdeas.diagram:
Data Bender:
* Mode: Macro
* Stereo: Unique (SHIFT+Bend blue)
* Bend: ~9 o'clock
* Break: ~9 o'clock
* Time: x4

Clock:

Mono Source:

- Mono Source (Out) -> Data Bender (In left) // normalizes to right
- Clock (Out) c> Data Bender (clock)
- Data Bender (Out left) -> Output (L)
- Data Bender (Out right) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Sidechain dropout gate
patchIdeas.patch: Corrupt in Dropout at ~2 o'clock · gate into corrupt gate from kick envelope follower · Corrupt Gate set to momentary · dropouts punch holes on every kick, leaving the signal clean between beats
patchIdeas.diagram:
Data Bender:
* Corrupt: Dropout · ~2 o'clock
* Gate behavior: momentary (SHIFT+Clock green)
* Mix: fully wet

Kick Envelope:

Synth:

- Synth (Out) -> Data Bender (In left)
- Kick Envelope (Out) g> Data Bender (corrupt gate) // hole on each kick
- Data Bender (Out left) -> Output (L)
